## Pages

- [Lantana Luxury Resort - Own a Cottage in Wayanad](/home): Buy a cottage, own a resort in Wayanad. Experience luxury living with lifetime amenities access at Lantana Resort in Meenangadi.
- [Main Attractions - Lantana Luxury Resort](/mainattractions): Explore our Aqua Spring Water Space and Aqua Dine Space.
- [Our Amenities - Lantana Luxury Resort](/ouramenities): World-class amenities including pool, gym, wifi, and dining.
- [Our Projects - Lantana Luxury Cottages Wayanad](/projects): Discover our exquisite cottage projects: Lantana VIOLET, Lantana MAGENTA, Lantana INDIGO, and Lantana OLIVE. Experience comfort meeting nature in our thoughtfully designed luxury cottages.
- [Our Projects - Lantana Luxury Resort](/ourprojects): Explore our varied cottage projects: Violet, Magenta, Indigo, and Olive.
- [Our Story - Lantana Luxury Resort](/story): Discover the story behind Lantana Resort in Meenangadi, Wayanad.
- [Why Choose Us - Lantana Luxury Resort](/whychooseus): Benefits of investing in Lantana Resort: High ROI, Ownership, and Eco-friendly living.
